title: Indie Semiconductor Q1 2026 EPS Miss Transcript
text: Indie Semiconductor reported mixed Q1 2026 results. Revenue of $55.5 million marginally exceeded forecasts, but significantly missed earnings expectations. EPS: -$0.21 (vs. -$0.06 forecast) a 250% miss. Net loss: $13.9 million. Non-GAAP operating loss: $11.1 million (improved from $15.1 million YoY). The stock declined 0.87% in aftermarket trading. CEO Donald McClymont stated indie's business remains very solid with strong design wins in radar and vision. The company secured a $25 million production order from a tier-one customer. The vision processor segment showed strong traction, with management noting it might exceed radar in 2026. Q2 2026 guidance: $59-65 million revenue ($62 million midpoint) with expected net loss per share of -$0.05.
